title: Best of George is back again!
description: GEORGE NEWS - It's time for the...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - It's time for the inaugural Best of George Readers' Choice Awards, an exciting celebration of excellence throughout our community. From top-notch services and impressive DIY endeavours to outstanding accommodations, delectable dining experiences, and rejuvenating health and beauty havens, we're on a quest to uncover and honour the finest establishments that make George shine.


> Brought to you by George Herald, these awards are inspired by the resounding success of similar initiatives across South Africa.


Now, it's our turn to showcase the talent and dedication within our town. And who better to serve as judges than our readers?

Here's how it works:

Starting 1 May, nominations will open across various categories. We're seeking businesses that not only excel in their respective fields but also embody the spirit of George, going above and beyond to elevate our community. Best of all, the nomination and voting process is entirely free, ensuring everyone has a voice in recognising their favourites.

So, don't miss your chance to champion the best in George. By participating, you not only contribute to the accolades of deserving establishments but also stand a chance to win special prizes yourself. Keep an eye on http://bestofgeorge.com/ and follow George Herald on Facebook for updates and details.

Let's come together to honour the heartbeat of our town and celebrate the unparalleled excellence that defines George. Join us in making history as we crown the champions of our community!

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
